case_title: MAC GO INC DBA FILTERS R US VS MAY FLOWER DBA. ADMIRAL MOVING SYSTEM

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $250.00 FILED BY MAC GO INC DBA FILTERS R US AS TO DEFENDANT MAY FLOWER DBA. ADMIRAL MOVING SYSTEM ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-19-1992 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 02
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
CERTIFIED MAIL TO EDWARD GRIEVE RETURNED SIGNED.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MAC GO INC DBA FILTERS R US RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MAY FLOWER DBA. ADMIRAL MOVING SYSTEM $250.00 PRINCIPAL, $13.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $263.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO ALAMEDA COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT MAY FLOWER DBA. ADMIRAL MOVING SYSTEM
